sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khat vei ni ciangin ah kikhen cih om nawn lo ding,
Ih leitung khualzinna hong bei ding,
Hi zong mangpha kikhak ma'n, Ih nuntakna a bei ma'n,
Kamciam na nong pia ngam diam tuni'n.
Khat khatin gun gal khatah i kantan dinga,
Ki-hal-lo-in a kan ih om zelta,
Tua man kiptak nong kamciam diam,
Gunpiau ah Ih kimu ding hiam?
Ke'n bel tung ning cih hong kamciam ingh.
Gunpiau ah kimu ding, A dum dildial gunpiau ah teeng ding,
Lungkiatna cih om nawn lo, singteh zong vul ngeilo,
A paisa lawmte mu ding hizo.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ih nunna ah sihna tung peelmawh ding cih thei hang,
Bang lokal hun sungin bei thei ding,
Khat vei ni teitei ciangin, ei tung hong tung veve ding,
Tua ni aading na kha muang nai hiam?
